OVERALL_SCORE: 30/109 passed (27.5%)
SUMMARY: Across all recorded runs, the system has 79 failures and 0 unclear outcomes. The current cumulative pass rate is 27.5%. Target mix: unknown (66), prod (43).
HITS:
- Total passed outcomes so far: 30.
- Stable categories with fewer failures are visible where fail counts remain low outside the top failing categories.
MISSES:
- Most repeated failing tests: onboard_01 (20), call_01v1 (14), call_02v1 (6).
- Most affected categories: onboarding (26), call_eval (22), adhoc call (9).
- Failures by target: unknown (42), prod (37).
BEHAVIOR_PATTERN:
Recent failures cluster around repeated scenarios rather than random spread, which suggests a few persistent behavior gaps.
GAPS:

- No responses were captured in the response pool for this task. (5)
- Only got 0/3 responses — 3 dropped or timed out. (5)
- The AI provided three separate messages instead of the required single response. (4)
RECOMMENDATION:
Prioritize fixes for the top failing tests/categories, then re-run only those categories to validate lift before full-suite regression.
